name: Santa Eulària Ibiza Marathon
summary: A scenic marathon starting from Puerto de Ibiza and finishing at the Passeig Marítim in Santa Eulària des Riu, passing through Puig d'en Valls, Santa Gertrudis, and the east coast of Ibiza.
heroNote: Great cheering spots in Eivissa near the start, at Santa Gertrudis around halfway, and along the Passeig Marítim finish area in Santa Eulària.
